description: India Book III, 54: Legal record (#64). Trousseau list (taqwīm). Groom: Peraḥya b. Yosef Yiju. Bride: Sitt al-Dār ('Mistress of the House'), the daughter of Peraḥya's paternal uncle, Avraham Yiju. NB: Goitein referred to this document as folio 27 (Firk. II NS 1700.27) in accordance with the foliation written in pen; but the correct folio is 28, as written in pencil (the librarian with the pen gave two folios the number 8).
tags: India, Marriage, register, Ibn Yiju, IB3
description_he: ספר הודו III,54: רשומת בית דין, רשימת נדוניה של סית אל-דאר, בת אברהם אבן יג'ו, כלה לפרחיה בן יוסף
